sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73010" key="o)ligo/dendros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγό-δενδρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n73010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having few trees,</tr_> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:p.152" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.152</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
